name: Campbell Soup - Old Fashioned Gingerbread Cak
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the tomato soup and eggs.
2. Add the gingerbread mix to the bowl.
3. Blend all ingredients together at low speed until thoroughly moistened.
4. Beat the mixture on medium speed for 2 minutes.
5. Gently fold in the raisins and chopped walnuts.
6. Transfer the batter to a greased tube pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool right side up in the pan for 10 minutes.
9. Remove the cake from the pan and let it cool completely before serving.
10. Dust with confectioners' sugar if desired.
